tools.name: lookup_domain
tools.description: The latest signed observation of one domain: who runs its nameservers, mail, and CDN; certificate issuer and expiry; HTTPS reachability; per-record-type counts; and the Ed25519 receipt pointer. Keyless calls get this reduced preview, throttled to 1 request per 15 seconds per IP under a shared daily

tools.name: whats_changed_today
tools.description: The daily "what changed on the internet" digest: a ranked top-20 of the most significant DNS, TLS, WHOIS, and infrastructure changes observed across the tracked catalog in the last 24 hours. Free and keyless. The complete change wire with sync cursors is the keyed /v1/changes endpoint.

tools.name: resolve_receipt
tools.description: Resolve any DomainDrift provenance receipt by id: the public Ed25519 commitment (output hash, signing key, timestamp, chain link) for one observation. Free and keyless. Verify the signing key against /.well-known/domaindrift-keys.json.

tools.name: internet_tape
tools.description: The rolling 24-hour aggregate rollup: how many domains changed DNS provider, switched certificate authority, moved mail, went unreachable, and the other tape legs, each with a live count. Free and keyless.

tools.name: signing_keys
tools.description: The Ed25519 public keys that sign every DomainDrift observation, with derivation paths and validity windows. Free and keyless. Use these to verify receipts and signed records offline.

findings.title: Description references secrets/credentials
findings.detail: Description of "lookup_domain" references sensitive artifacts (authorization, bearer). A tool description has no reason to mention credentials.

evidence.snippet: The latest signed observation of one domain: who runs its nameservers, mail, and CDN; certificate issuer and expiry; HTTPS reachability; per-record-type counts;…
